subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: This is an emblem, even as the circumambulation of the Sacred House must needs be performed at an appointed time and place [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این رمز است مانند آن که طواف کعبه را باید در وقت معینی و محل
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @spiritual transformation, @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc., @pilgrimage [Hajj] in Islam
